scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @switchyagain/proxy-engine && npm run build --workspace @switchyagain/extension-runtime && npm run build --workspace @switchyagain/web-ui && npm run clean:dist && npm run build:ts && node build-ts/build.mjs
scripts.build:ts: npm run clean:ts && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json && tsc -p tsconfig.build-script.json
scripts.clean:ts: node --input-type=module -e "import {rmSync} from 'node:fs'; rmSync('build-ts', {recursive: true, force: true})"
scripts.clean:dist: node --input-type=module -e "import {readdirSync, rmSync} from 'node:fs'; for (const file of readdirSync('.')) if (file === 'index.js' || file.endsWith('.min.js')) rmSync(file, {force: true})"
scripts.dev: npm link @switchyagain/extension-runtime && npm link @switchyagain/web-ui && npm link @switchyagain/proxy-engine
scripts.release: node ../../scripts/generate-browser-entrypoints.mjs --check && npm run build --workspace @switchyagain/proxy-engine && npm run build --workspace @switchyagain/extension-runtime && npm run build --workspace @switchyagain/web-ui && npm run clean:dist && npm run build:ts && node build-ts/build.mjs release
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.build-script.json --noEmit && npm run typecheck:test
